channel.title: Ken's AI English Podcast
channel.description: Daily 10-minute English lessons through AI, tech, Malaysia, Japan, real estate, startups, and early childhood education news.
channel.itunes:author: Ken

item.title: 2026-05-01 | SOAR | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] 200,000 MCP servers expose a command execution flaw that Anthropic calls a feature | [Startup] xAI launches Grok 4.3 at an aggressively low price and a new, fast, powerful voice cloning suite | [Startup] The AI scaffolding layer is collapsing. LlamaIndex's CEO explains what survives. | [Startup] Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic | [Startup] Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations to fix the workflows breaking enterprise AI

item.title: 2026-04-30 | Before-After-Bridge | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [AI] Exclusive eBook: Inside the stealthy startup that pitched brainless human clones | [Japan] NY市場 円相場1ドル＝156円台 市場介入に警戒高まる | [Japan] Yen soars as Japan intervenes after issuing 'final' warning | [Startup] Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks | [Startup] Alibaba's Metis agent cuts redundant AI tool calls from 98% to 2% — and gets more accurate doing it

item.title: 2026-04-29 | SCR | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] Amazon’s OpenAI gambit signals a new phase in the cloud wars — one where exclusivity no longer applies | [AI] GPT-5.5 is OpenAI’s most capable agentic AI model yet | [Startup] AI vs AI: Inside Southeast Asia’s new cybersecurity war | [Startup] Southeast Asia’s cyber boom is fuelled by fear—and AI | [Startup] Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise

item.title: 2026-04-28 | PSI | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Malaysia] Musk faces OpenAI in court over claims it betrayed founding mission | [Startup] Microsoft and OpenAI gut their exclusive deal, freeing OpenAI to sell on AWS and Google Cloud | [AI] Introducing NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Long-Context Multimodal Intelligence for Documents, Audio and Video Agents | [Startup] Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS | [Startup] Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal

item.title: 2026-04-27 | PREP | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data | [Startup] New AI framework autonomously optimizes training data, architectures and algorithms — outperforming human baselines | [Startup] OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal | [Startup] Open source Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 and V2.5-Pro are among the most efficient (and affordable) at agentic 'claw' tasks | [AI] The Download: DeepSeek’s latest AI breakthrough, and the race to build world models

item.title: 2026-04-26 | Pyramid | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce | [Startup] Monitoring LLM behavior: Drift, retries, and refusal patterns | [Japan] Hormuz crisis throws spotlight on world's largest 'chokepoint' — the Malacca Strait | [Japan] 北海道で震度5強 泊原発は異常や被害確認されず | [Startup] How fintech in Asia is enabling and making education affordable for everyone

item.title: 2026-04-26 | Pyramid | Ken's AI English Podcast
item.description: [Startup] How fintech in Asia | [Japan] Trump shooting incident | [Startup] Anthropic agent marketplace | [Startup] Cohere merges with Aleph Alpha
